category_sources: Official repository summary says hexhog is a hex viewer/editor.
source_facts.description says hexhog is a hex viewer/editor.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official DVDTSB/hexhog repository.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; its README is the best available documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/DVDTSB/hexhog; per instructions repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: current_curation.tags includes cli, and source_facts.executables lists hexhog.
